## Summary

- What problem does this PR solve?
- What changed at a high level?

## User-facing impact

- What should reviewers test in the UI or API?
- Are there any behavior changes, config changes, or data-source changes?

## Implementation notes

- Key architectural or parser decisions
- Important files or modules touched
- Any intentional tradeoffs

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed

Validation details:

- `...`

## Risks

- Known edge cases
- Follow-up work that is intentionally out of scope

## Rollout / recovery

- How should this be rolled out?
- If something goes wrong, how should it be reverted or recovered?

## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] Naming and structure follow project conventions
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, or generated local artifacts were committed
- [ ] New UI text is localized
- [ ] Demo screenshots and README visuals were generated from bundled demo data when applicable
- [ ] Maintainer release checklist was reviewed when this PR affects public release readiness
- [ ] Docs / copy / config updates are included where needed
